description: This file implements a singly linked list data structure with methods to add, remove, retrieve size, and get elements by index. It defines a LinkedList class along with an internal Node class and a helper method to find the tail node.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A singly linked list implementation supporting add, remove, size, and get operations.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new element to the end of the linked list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the list.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of elements in the list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Helper method to unlink a node from the list.

methods.name: tail
methods.description: Static method to find the tail node of the list starting from head.
